description: GitHub MCP Server tool profile for codefreedom — configures container image, ports, data directory, and environment.
notes: The 'github' block defines all settings for 'codefreedom tools github'.

'image' is the Docker image to use — 'docker.io/nilayparikh/codefreedom:github-latest' wraps ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server with an HTTP bridge. (Also available on ghcr.io/nilayparikh/codefreedom as a mirror.)
'port' is the host port (0 = auto-pick random free port in range 8100-8199).
'data_dir' (optional) is the host path mounted to /data inside the container.
'env' are environment variables forwarded to the container. GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN is required — set via ${GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN} or hardcode.
